practicalFluencyLevels.label: New to AI
practicalFluencyLevels.description: Has little or no recent hands-on experience with generative AI tools.

practicalFluencyLevels.label: Foundational user
practicalFluencyLevels.description: Can use common AI tools for simple tasks and wants stronger foundations.

practicalFluencyLevels.label: Applied user
practicalFluencyLevels.description: Uses AI in practical workflows and wants to improve quality and judgment.

practicalFluencyLevels.label: Advanced practitioner
practicalFluencyLevels.description: Designs, evaluates, supervises, or extends AI-assisted work.

technicalOrientationLevels.label: General user
technicalOrientationLevels.description: Uses AI through everyday tools without building technical systems.

technicalOrientationLevels.label: Productivity and low-code user
technicalOrientationLevels.description: Uses automations, low-code tools, templates, or productivity workflows.

technicalOrientationLevels.label: Developer or data practitioner
technicalOrientationLevels.description: Works with code, data, analytics, APIs, or technical platforms.

technicalOrientationLevels.label: AI/ML builder
technicalOrientationLevels.description: Builds, adapts, evaluates, or governs AI/ML-enabled systems.
